problem id: 75e869dd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  00110111 -> 10011111
  01010010 -> 00111101
  11000101 -> 11110011
  10110010 -> 01111101
  00001100 -> 00000111
  00011100 -> 00001111
  11100111 -> 11111011
  10101000 -> 01111110

query: 10010110
predicted answer: 01101111
